channel.title: Menopause Sleep & Night Sweats — Hush
channel.description: Menopause Sleep & Night Sweats — hormone-free menopause self-care pins from Hush.

item.title: Why You Keep Waking Up at 3am in Menopause
item.description: Falling asleep fine, then wide awake at 3am staring at the ceiling - the 3am wake-up is one of menopause's most common and least-talked-about sleep changes. Our guide explains what's going on at night. Save this and read it on the blog. #menopausesleep #perimenopause #midlifewellness
